title: astragalus mutus
intro: Astragalus mutus, also known as Huang Qi, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the legume family and is native to the mountainous regions of China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus mutus include enhancing the body's immune system, reducing stress and fatigue, and improving overall well-being, making it a popular herbal remedy for preventing illnesses such as the common cold and flu. Astragalus mutus can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
